title: MC - Nether On Earth
description: Minecraft modpack that captures the vibe and essence of the modern doom games.
body:
![TITLE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5b5f6483fe4d0eda5da83f24c1f71447510546e.png)The Nether spreads. This modpack brings to you a bunch of mods in the style of Quake/Doom. Notable features include :

- Nether Overhaul
- End Overhaul
- Doom Weapons
- Quake / Doom Eternal style physics
- Block Physics and Ragdolls
- Visuals styled around Doom Eternal

We recommend to play on hard mode for the best experience. We also recommend you avoid using shaders unless your computer can handle it with this amount of mods!
